monsters.name: Acid Slime (L)
monsters.ai_logic: When not splitting, approximately a 30-40-30 probability split between Corrosive Spit, Tackle, and Lick. Tackle cannot be used twice in a row, and the other moves cannot be used three times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: When not splitting, approximately a 40-30-30 probability split between Corrosive Spit, Tackle, and Lick. Lick cannot be used twice in a row, and the other moves cannot be used three times in a row.
monsters.notes: Splits if HP is 50% or below

monsters.name: Acid Slime (M)
monsters.ai_logic: Same AI as Acid Slime (L)
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: When not splitting, approximately a 40-40-20 probability split between Corrosive Spit, Tackle, and Lick. Lick cannot be used twice in a row, and the other moves cannot be used three times in a row.

monsters.name: Acid Slime (S)
monsters.ai_logic: 50% chance of each move on turn 1, then alternates between the two.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Always starts with Lick, then alternates between the two moves.

monsters.name: Blue Slaver
monsters.ai_logic: 40% chance to use Rake, but cannot use the same move three times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: 40% chance to use Rake, but cannot use Stab three times in a row or Rake twice in a row.

monsters.name: Cultist
monsters.ai_logic: First uses Incantation, then repeats Dark Strike.

monsters.name: Fat Gremlin
monsters.ai_logic: Smash every turn.

monsters.name: Fungi Beast
monsters.ai_logic: 60% chance of Bite, but cannot use Bite 3 times in a row or Buff twice in a row.

monsters.name: Green Louse
monsters.starts_with: Curl Up N, where N is random between 3-7 ((Asc7: 4-8) | (Asc17: 9-12))
monsters.ai_logic: 75% chance of Bite and 25% chance of Spit Web, but cannot use the same move three times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: 75% chance of Bite and 25% chance of Spit Web, but cannot Spit Web twice in a row or Bite 3 times in a row.

monsters.name: Gremlin Wizard
monsters.ai_logic: Charges for 2 turns, and then uses Ultimate Blast. Afterwards, charges 3 turns and then uses Ultimate Blast, repeating until dead.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Charges for 2 turns, and then repeats Ultimate Blast.

monsters.name: Jaw Worm
monsters.ai_logic: Always starts with Chomp. Afterwards, 45-30-25 probability split between Bellow, Thrash and Chomp. Thrash cannot be used three times in a row. Chomp and Bellow cannot be used twice in a row.
monsters.notes: Starts with the bonuses of Bellow

monsters.name: Looter
monsters.ai_logic: First, uses Mug twice. Then, has a 50% chance to use Lunge. Either after Lunge or in place of Lunge, uses Smoke Bomb, followed by Escape.

monsters.name: Mad Gremlin
monsters.ai_logic: Always uses Scratch.

monsters.name: Red Louse
monsters.starts_with: Curl Up N, where N is random between 3-7 ((Asc7: 4-8) | (Asc17: 9-12))
monsters.ai_logic: 75% chance of Bite and 25% chance of Grow, but cannot use the same move three times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: 75% chance of Bite, and 25% chance of Grow, but cannot Grow twice in a row or Bite three times in a row.

monsters.name: Red Slaver
monsters.ai_logic: Always starts with Stab. Then, has a 25% chance of using Entangle until it is used. If Entangle has not been used yet, cycles in the order of Scrape -> Scrape -> Stab. Otherwise, 45% chance of Stab and 55% chance of Scrape, except Stab and Scrape cannot be used 3 times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Always starts with Stab. Then, has a 25% chance of using Entangle until it is used. If Entangle has not been used yet, cycles in the order of Scrape -> Stab. Otherwise, 45% chance of Stab and 55% chance of Scrape, except Stab cannot be used 3 times in a row and Scrape cannot be used twice in a row.

monsters.name: Shield Gremlin
monsters.ai_logic: Protects random allies until none remain, then uses Shield Bash.

monsters.name: Sneaky Gremlin
monsters.ai_logic: Always uses Puncture.

monsters.name: Spike Slime (L)
monsters.ai_logic: Has (30-70) probability split between Flame Tackle and Lick, though neither can be used three times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Has (30-70) probability split between Flame Tackle and Lick, though Lick cannot be used twice in a row and Flame Tackle cannot be used three times in a row.
monsters.notes: Splits if HP is 50% or below

monsters.name: Spike Slime (M)
monsters.ai_logic: Same AI as Spike Slime (L)

monsters.name: Spike Slime (S)
monsters.ai_logic: Always uses Tackle.

monsters.name: Gremlin Nob
monsters.ai_logic: Always starts with Bellow. Afterwards, has a 33-67 split between Skull Bash and Rush, but cannot use Rush 3 times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Always starts with Bellow. Afterwards, cycles in the order of Skull Bash -> Rush -> Rush.

monsters.name: Lagavulin
monsters.ai_logic: After waking up, cycles in the order of Attack -> Attack -> Siphon Soul.

monsters.name: Sentry
monsters.ai_logic: In a 3-Sentry encounter, the Sentries start with Bolt/Beam/Bolt. In the Sentry + Spheric Guardian encounter, the Sentry starts with Bolt. Always alternates between the two moves.

monsters.name: Hexaghost

moves.name: Divider
moves.description: Deals (N+1)×6 damage. N = Player's HP at the start of the turn, divided by 12 (rounded down).

monsters.ai_logic: Always begins with Activate, then Divider. Afterwards, cycles in the order of Sear -> Tackle -> Sear -> Inflame -> Tackle -> Sear -> Inferno, with 0-6 orbs active, respectively.

monsters.name: Slime Boss
monsters.ai_logic: Always cycles in the order of Goop Spray -> Preparing -> Slam.
monsters.notes: Splits into a Spike Slime (L) and an Acid Slime (L) if HP is 50% or below

monsters.name: The Guardian
monsters.ai_logic: Offensive mode: Cycles as Charge Up -> Fierce Bash -> Vent Steam -> Whirlwind. If enough damage is applied to satisfy the breakpoint, Guardian instantly gains 20 Block as it enters defensive mode. Defensive mode: Close Up -> Roll Attack -> Twin Slam. After Twin Slam, re-enters offensive cycle with Whirlwind.

phases.notes: After receiving 30 + 10*X (35 + 10*X) (40 + 10*X) damage, gains 20 block and immediately enters Defensive Mode. X is the number of such transitions that have occured.
phases.ai_logic: Always cycles in the order of Charge Up -> Fierce Bash -> Vent Steam -> Whirlwind. The fight always begins with Charge Up. After using Twin Slam in defensive mode, Whirlwind is used next.

phases.notes: Sharp Hide returns 3 (4) damage after an Attack card is played. It is not the same effect as Thorns.
phases.ai_logic: Always uses Close Up, then Roll Attack, then Twin Slam (after which he returns to offensive mode with Whirlwind).

monsters.name: Byrd
monsters.ai_logic: Cannot use Swoop on turn 1. When flying, has a 50-20-30 split between Peck, Swoop, and Caw. Peck cannot be used three times in a row and Swoop and Caw cannot be used twice in a row. When knocked down, is stunned, then uses Headbutt, and then starts flying again.

monsters.name: Centurion
monsters.ai_logic: While the Mystic is alive, either uses Defend on the Mystic or Slash (about 35-65 probability split). Once the Mystic dies, Defend is replaced by Fury. Uses Defend on itself if was about to use Defend and the Mystic dies. Cannot use any move three times in a row.

monsters.name: Chosen
monsters.ai_logic: Always starts with Poke, followed by Hex. Then alternates between using either Debilitate or Drain (50% chance each), and using either Zap or Poke (40% Zap, 60% Poke).
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Always starts with Hex. Then alternates between using either Debilitate or Drain (50% chance each), and using either Zap or Poke (40% Zap, 60% Poke).

monsters.name: Mugger
monsters.ai_logic: First, uses Mug twice. Then, has a 50% chance to use Lunge. Either after Lunge or in place of Lunge, uses Smoke Bomb, followed by Escape.

monsters.name: Mystic
monsters.ai_logic: If there is 16 HP to heal, uses Heal (up to twice in a row). Otherwise, has a 60% chance of attacking and a 40% chance of buffing, but Attack and Buff cannot happen three times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: If there is 21 HP to heal, uses Heal (up to twice in a row). Otherwise, has a 60% chance of attacking and a 40% chance of buffing, but Attack Debuff cannot be used twice in a row, and Buff cannot be used three times in a row.

monsters.name: Shelled Parasite
monsters.ai_logic: Cannot use Fell on turn 1. Has a 40-40-20 split between Double Strike, Suck, and Fell, but Double Strike and Suck cannot be used three times in a row and Fell cannot be used twice in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Always starts with Fell. Has a 40-40-20 split between Double Strike, Suck, and Fell, but Double Strike and Suck cannot be used three times in a row and Fell cannot be used twice in a row.

monsters.name: Snake Plant
monsters.ai_logic: 65% chance of Chomp and 35% chance of Enfeebling Spores, except Chomp cannot happen 3 times in a row and Enfeebling Spores cannot happen twice in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Same as base AI until Enfeebling Spores is used. Afterwards, cycles in the order of Chomp -> Chomp -> Enfeebling Spores.

monsters.name: Snecko
monsters.ai_logic: Starts with Perplexing Glare. Then, 40% chance of Tail Whip and 60% chance of Bite, but cannot use Bite 3 times in a row.

monsters.name: Spheric Guardian
monsters.ai_logic: First, uses Activate, followed by Attack Debuff. Afterwards, alternates between Slam and Harden.

monsters.name: Book of Stabbing
monsters.ai_logic: 15% chance to use Attack 2, except Attack 1 cannot be used 3 times in a row, and Attack 2 cannot be used twice in a row.

monsters.name: Gremlin Leader
monsters.ai_logic: With 0 allies, has a 75-25 split between Rally and Stab. With 1 ally, has a 50-50 split between Rally and Stab if the last move was Encourage, and a 62.5-37.5 split between Rally and Encourage if the last move was Stab. With >1 ally, has a 66-34 split between Encourage and Stab. Cannot use any move twice in a row.

monsters.name: Taskmaster
monsters.ai_logic: Always uses Scouring Whip.

monsters.name: Bronze Automaton
monsters.ai_logic: Deterministic order. First, uses Spawn Orbs. Afterwards, cycles in the order of Flail -> Boost -> Flail -> Boost -> HYPER BEAM -> Stunned. In Ascension 19, uses Boost instead of Stunned.

monsters.name: The Champ
monsters.ai_logic: Every 4 turns, uses Taunt. Otherwise, approximately (15/15/25/45) (30/0/25/45) probability split between (Defensive Stance/Gloat/Face Slap/Heavy Slash). No move can be used twice in a row, and Defensive Stance cannot be used more than 2 times, total (this applies to enraged too). When attempting to use an invalid move, will use the next move in the order of Defensive Stance -> Gloat -> Face Slap -> Heavy Slash -> Face Slap (instead of even probability distribution).
monsters.notes: Enrages when reaching below 50% hp (no indicator)

phases.ai_logic: First, uses Anger. Then, next turn and every three turns thereafter, uses Execute. Otherwise, approximately a (15/15/25/45) (30/0/25/45) probability split between (Defensive Stance/Gloat/Face Slap/Heavy Slash). When attempting to use an invalid move, will use the next move in the order of Defensive Stance -> Gloat -> Face Slap -> Heavy Slash -> Face Slap (instead of even probability distribution).

monsters.name: The Collector
monsters.ai_logic: Always begins with Spawn. On turn 4, always uses the Mega Debuff. Otherwise, if a Torch Head is dead, has approximately a (25/45/30) probability split between (Revive/Fireball/Buff). If all Torch Heads are alive, the split becomes (70/30) between (Fireball/Buff). Cannot use Revive or Buff twice in a row, or Fireball three times in a row.

moves: Spawn Torch Heads in empty slots (max 2)

monsters.name: Bronze Orb
monsters.ai_logic: Has a 75% chance of using Stasis until it has been used. Otherwise, has a 70% chance of using Support Beam and 30% chance of using Beam, but cannot use the same move 3 times in a row.
monsters.notes: Stasis always steals a random card of the highest rarity in your draw pile (or discard pile, if the draw pile is empty).

monsters.name: Torch Head
monsters.ai_logic: Always uses Tackle.

monsters.name: Bear
monsters.ai_logic: Starts with Bear Hug, then alternates between Lunge and Maul.

monsters.name: Pointy
monsters.ai_logic: Always Attacks.

monsters.name: Romeo
monsters.ai_logic: Starts with Mock (Unknown Move), then alternates between Agonizing Slash and Cross Slash.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Starts with Mock (Unknown Move). Afterwards, cycles in the order of Agonizing Slash -> Cross Slash -> Cross Slash.

monsters.name: Darkling
monsters.ai_logic: On turn 1, 50% chance of either Nip or Harden. Afterwards, has a 30-40-30 split between Nip, Chomp, and Harden, but  Harden and Chomp both cannot be used twice in a row, and Nip cannot be used three times in a row. The middle Darkling cannot Chomp and has a 50-50 split instead. When "half-dead", uses Unknown, followed by Reincarnate.

monsters.name: Exploder
monsters.ai_logic: Attacks twice, and then explodes.

monsters.name: Jaw Worm (Hard)
monsters.ai_logic: 45-30-25 probability split between Bellow, Thrash and Chomp. Thrash cannot be used three times in a row. Chomp and Bellow cannot be used twice in a row.
monsters.notes: Act 3 version. Starts with innate Strength 3/4/5 and Block 6/6/9 (equivalent to one Bellow).

monsters.name: Orb Walker
monsters.ai_logic: Has a 60-40 split between Laser and Claw, but neither move can be used three times in a row.

monsters.name: Repulsor
monsters.ai_logic: 20% chance of Attack, and 80% chance of Debuff. Cannot use Attack twice in a row.

monsters.name: Spiker
monsters.ai_logic: 50% chance of each action, but cannot use Attack twice in a row. Cannot use (Buff) once it has been used 6 times and will otherwise use Attack.

monsters.name: Spire Growth
monsters.ai_logic: Has a 50% chance to use Quick Tackle and 50% chance to Constrict. If Constrict was used last turn or the player is already Constricted, uses Smash instead of Constrict. Cannot use either attack three times in a row.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: Always uses Constrict unless it was used last turn or the player is already Constricted. Otherwise, has a 50% chance to use Quick Tackle and 50% chance to use Smash. Cannot use either attack three times in a row.

monsters.name: The Maw
monsters.ai_logic: Always starts with Roar. Afterwards and after using Drool, has a 50-50 split between Slam and Nom. If used Slam, then has a 50-50 split between Nom and Drool. Always uses Drool after Nom.

monsters.name: Transient
monsters.ai_logic: Always uses Attack.

monsters.name: Writhing Mass
monsters.ai_logic: For the first move, has an approximately equal chance of using Attack 1, Attack 2, and Attack Debuff. Then, has about a 10-30-20-30-10 split between Mega Debuff, Attack Defend, Attack Debuff, Attack 1, and Attack 2, but can only use Mega Debuff once each combat. The same move cannot be used (or rerolled) twice in a row.

monsters.name: Giant Head
monsters.ai_logic: For the first 4 turns, has a 50-50 split between Count and Glare, but cannot use either move three times in a row. Afterwards, repeats It Is Time.
monsters.ai_logic_asc20: For the first 3 turns, has a 50-50 split between Count and Glare, but cannot use either move three times in a row. Afterwards, repeats It Is Time.

monsters.name: Nemesis
monsters.ai_logic: On turn 1, has a 50% chance of using the Burn or Triple Attack. Afterwards, has approximately a (35/35/30) probability split between the three moves (Burn/Triple Attack/Scythe), except Scythe and Burn cannot be used twice in a row, and Triple Attack cannot be used three times in a row.

monsters.name: Reptomancer
monsters.ai_logic: Always starts with Summon. Otherwise, has an approximately equal chance of using all 3 moves, except cannot use Snake Strike twice in a row, Summon 3 times in a row, or Big Bite twice in a row. Cannot use Summon with 4 Daggers in play (will use the Snake Strike instead).

monsters.name: Awakened One
monsters.ai_logic: Phase 1: Always begins with Slash. Then, has 25% chance of using Soul Strike and a 75% chance of using Slash, except Soul Strike cannot be used twice in a row and Slash cannot be used three times in a row. Becomes half-dead and uses Rebirth upon hitting 0 hp to enter phase 2. Phase 2: Always begins with Dark Echo. Then, 50-50 chance of using Sludge or Tackle, except neither can be used three times in a row.

phases.ai_logic: Always begins with Slash. Afterwards, has a 25% chance of using Soul Strike and a 75% chance of Slash, except Soul Strike cannot be used twice in a row and slash cannot be used three times in a row. Becomes "half dead" and uses Rebirth upon hitting 0 hp.
Always begins with Dark Echo. Afterwards, has a 50% chance of using Sludge or Tackle, except neither can be used three times in a row.

monsters.name: Deca
monsters.ai_logic: Always begins by using Beam, and then alternates between its two moves.

monsters.name: Donu
monsters.ai_logic: Always begins by using Circle of Power, and then alternates between its two moves.

monsters.name: Time Eater
monsters.ai_logic: Always uses Haste once, immediately after reaching below 50% HP. Otherwise, approximately a (20/45/35) probability split between Ripple, Reverberate, and Head Slam, except Ripple and Head Slam cannot be used twice in a row, and Reverberate cannot be used three times in a row.

monsters.name: Dagger
monsters.ai_logic: Uses Stab, then explodes.

monsters.name: Spire Shield
monsters.ai_logic: Every 3 turns, starting from turn 3, uses Smash. Otherwise, has an equal chance of either using Bash followed by Fortify or Fortify followed by Bash.

monsters.name: Spire Spear
monsters.ai_logic: Always starts with Burn Strike. Every 3 turns, starting from turn 2, uses Skewer. Otherwise, has an equal chance to either use Burn Strike followed by Piercer or Piercer followed by Burn Strike.

monsters.name: Corrupt Heart
monsters.ai_logic: Always begins with Debilitate. Every 3 turns, starting from turn 4, uses Buff. Otherwise, has an equal chance of either using Blood Shots followed by Echo or Echo followed by Blood Shots.

moves: Vuln + Weak + Frail 2, All Status cards 1*
Cleanse Strength Down, Strength 2, Additional Buff**

ascension_variants.notes: *All Status cards go into the Draw Pile

meta.notes: Multiple HP/damage values represent different ascension levels
